case.title: IN RE NEW ORLEANS PUBLIC SERVICE, INC.

opinion.h: IN RE NEW ORLEANS PUBLIC SERVICE, INC. , 469 U.S. 1180 (1985)
In re NEW ORLEANS PUBLIC SERVICE, INC., petitioner No. 84-764
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The petition for writ of certiorari and/or mandamus to the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit is denied.
Justice POWELL took no part in the consideration or decision of this petition.[ In re New Orleans Public Service, Inc. 469 U.S. 1180 (1985) ]
